messages.body: Hi Andreas, can we schedule a 30-min call next week to review progress? Tuesday or Wednesday works for us.
Hi, thanks for reaching out. I may have limited availability next week. Let me confirm shortly.
Just following up — we need to lock this in today if possible.
Hello, Invoice #4581 is now 10 days overdue. Please confirm payment status.
Thanks for the reminder. I will check internally with finance.
Following up again. We have not received confirmation yet.
Production API returning 502 errors since 05:45 UTC. Please investigate immediately.
Impacting Eurobank-Loyalty clients. This is high priority.
Error rate increasing. Now at 37% failed requests.
We need a 30-minute review meeting for the production API incident. Are you available tomorrow at 11:00?
Yes, I am available tomorrow at 11:00.
Great. Please send the calendar invite for tomorrow at 11:00 and include the engineering lead.
